headline: Blackstone Shifts From Spanish Rentals To UAE Digital Payments Exposure
summary: Blackstone (NYSE:BX) has agreed to sell its Fidere residential portfolio in Spain, the country's largest multifamily transaction since the 2007 to 2009 financial crisis. The firm is also taking a minority stake in Advanced Digital Gaming Technology (ADGT), a newly created UAE based payments and data intelligence platform. Both moves recycle capital from mature real estate into a new position linked to digital payments and regulated digital markets across the Middle East and other...
